text:
- Update to 1.08_1

Add script patch to recompile grammar against new Parse::RecDescent as
suggested in bug #53948 for CSS:
https://rt.cpan.org/Public/Bug/Display.html?id=53948#txn-735088

- files/build-grammar.pl

Port maintainer (perl@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
